description_long: This is a small bird with a streamlined body, predominantly dark brown to grayish-black in color, featuring lighter horizontal barring across its back, wings, and tail. The bird has a slender, slightly curved beak and a rounded head with subtle markings around the eyes. Its wings are folded tightly against its body, and the tail is straight with visible banding. The legs are thin and appear to be a muted grayish color, tucked close to the body. The plumage pattern is intricate, with alternating light and dark bars giving it a camouflaged appearance. The overall form is compact and aerodynamic, typical of many urban-dwelling bird species.
description: A small, dark brown bird with light horizontal barring, a slender curved beak, and a banded tail. Its compact body and intricate plumage pattern suggest a species adapted for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, banded tail, and detailed barring on the wings and back.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded head, straight tail, and the symmetry of the feather pattern along the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same barring and banded tail, with the beak and legs visible.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the bird's face, slender beak, and the subtle markings around the eyes.
attribute_plumage_pattern: horizontal barring and banding across back, wings, and tail
